channel.title: Morning Whisper Radio
channel.description: Meditative morning news broadcasts with audio and show notes.

item.title: Geopolitical tensions remain high as Israel and Lebanon move toward a potential ceasefire, with reports indicating that both parties are negotiating a deal to end hostilities
item.description: Selected sources: NVIDIA Blog: NVIDIA Enables the Next Era Of Physical AI Research With Agent Skills For Autonomous Vehicles, Robotics And Vision AI; FAZ Wirtschaft: Business-Ticker: SpaceX setzt Ausgabepreis für Börsengang; France24 En: North Korea unveils new nuclear fuel facility, vows 'exponential' expansion of nuclear arsenal; Google Research Blog: The next chapter in flood resilience: Open sourcing Google’s hydrology framework; Business: American capitalism has taken an apocalyptic turn; OpenAI News: Introducing new capabilities to GPT-Rosalind; Handelsblatt: +++ Iran-Krieg +++: Israel und Libanon wollen Waffenruhe umsetzen; Deutsche Welle English: Israel, Lebanon renew ceasefire after US-brokered talks
